Documentation.long_help: Stent-like deformation along a walked centerline segment. Port 0: vessel vtkPolyData; port 1: centerline polyline. Alignment applies only inside the flat-ended cylinder: perpendicular distance ≤ StentRadius to the axis and between the two axial half-spaces through the first/last axis points. There, each vertex is moved along its point normal (vtkPolyDataNormals on the surface) so distance to the axis becomes StentRadius (numerical solve; cylindrical fallback if needed). Points still within distance R of the axis but outside the flat slab (capsule hemispheres) are left unchanged. StentAxisSampleSpacing densifies the internal axis polyline for closest-point queries. Output point data gets an int array (AffectMaskArrayName, default StentPlacementAffectMask): 0 where the vertex was updated in the strict region, -1 elsewhere (set during deformation, not by comparing to input positions). A double array (GeodesicToZeroRegionArrayName, default StentGeodesicToZeroRegion) gives surface geodesic distance along polygon edges (lengths in the deformed mesh) from each mask≠0 vertex to the nearest mask==0 vertex; mask==0 gets 0; no polygons or unreachable components get -1.
Documentation.short_help: Flat-capped stent alignment (vertex normals), strict slab only.

InputProperty.name: Centerline
InputProperty.Documentation: Centerline polyline(s), same style as SHYX Vessel End Clipper port 1 (vtkLine / vtkPolyLine cells).

IntVectorProperty.name: AnchorCenterlinePointId
IntVectorProperty.label: Anchor Centerline Point Id
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Point id on the centerline mesh whose position is the stent center. Must lie on the line graph.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: StentLength
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Stent Length
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Total arc length along the centerline used for the stent segment (world units).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: StentRadius
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Stent Radius
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Target perpendicular distance from the local centerline tangent (world units).

DoubleVectorProperty.name: StentAxisSampleSpacing
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Stent Axis Sample Spacing
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Maximum arc length between consecutive samples on the internal stent axis polyline. Zero keeps only graph-walk vertices; a positive value subdivides each axis segment so the piecewise-linear axis used for closest-point queries is denser (often smoother deformation near bends).

IntVectorProperty.name: PreferInputPointNormals
IntVectorProperty.label: Prefer input point normals
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: When on, use the input surface point-data Normals array if present; otherwise vtkPolyDataNormals is run on the surface (splitting off, consistency + auto-orient).

StringVectorProperty.name: CenterlineRadiusArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Centerline radius array
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Point-data array on port 1 (Centerline). After each interactive snap to a centerline vertex, StentRadius is set from this array at that point id (first component). Clear the name to keep the radius from the widget only. Typical VMTK output: MaximumInscribedSphereRadius.

StringVectorProperty.name: AffectMaskArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Affect mask array name
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Name of the vtkIntArray written on output point data: 0 for vertices moved in the strict flat-capped region, -1 for all others. Cleared or empty falls back to StentPlacementAffectMask.

StringVectorProperty.name: GeodesicToZeroRegionArrayName
StringVectorProperty.label: Geodesic to zero-region array name
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Name of the vtkDoubleArray on output: for vertices with affect mask ≠ 0, shortest path distance along mesh edges to the nearest vertex with mask 0 (edge weights use deformed vertex positions); mask 0 vertices store 0. Empty name falls back to StentGeodesicToZeroRegion. -1 if no seed or unreachable (e.g. no vtkPolys).
